module.description: Open-source framework for building your org's internal coding agent

comments.pr_opened: I've completed the implementation and opened a PR: {pr_url}
comments.pr_updated: I've updated the PR with the latest changes: {pr_url}
comments.no_changes: No changes were needed for this task.
comments.auth_bot_mode: Using bot token for authentication (no per-user OAuth configured).
comments.error_sandbox: Failed to create sandbox environment. Please retry.

rules.max_pr_files: PR touches too many files ({changed_files}). Consider splitting into smaller PRs.
rules.no_force_push: Force push is not allowed on this repository.
rules.test_before_pr: Tests must pass before opening a PR.
rules.no_destructive_commands: Destructive commands (rm -rf /, DROP TABLE, etc.) are blocked.
rules.max_file_size: File exceeds maximum allowed size ({max_size_kb} KB).

guardrails.output_blocked: Output blocked: potential sensitive data detected.
guardrails.destructive_command: Destructive command pattern detected and blocked.

welcome.tagline: Your internal coding agent — triggered from Slack, Linear, or GitHub

prompt-pills.label: Fix a bug
prompt-pills.prompt: Fix the bug described in issue #{issue_number}

prompt-pills.label: Code review
prompt-pills.prompt: Review the PR #{pr_number} and provide feedback

prompt-pills.label: Implement feature
prompt-pills.prompt: Implement the feature described in the Linear ticket
